With its highly anticipated dual-platform OTT release officially locked for June 4, 2026, the film is racing against time to make the most out its final theatrical run. Amid this, fans looking forward to revisiting the high-octane spy drama can catch it on streaming platforms next month. 'Dhurandhar 2' is opting for a unique dual-platform digital release of JioHotstar premiere on June 4. Iran war lessons: US eyes low-cost cruise missiles; what are India’s plans?
description: Global conflicts highlight the need for affordable, long-range weapons. The US is procuring thousands of new, mass-producible cruise missiles, the Barracuda-500M, for over $2.6 million each. India, too, is seeking similar low-cost, high-volume strike capabilities, including drones and missiles, under its upcoming Defence Acquisition Procedure 2026.

Bhojshala verdict: Fresh plea seeks removal of 'Islamic symbols', excavation
description: Following the Madhya Pradesh High Court's verdict recognizing Dhar's Bhojshala complex as Goddess Vagdevi's temple, Hindu petitioners have filed new pleas. They are demanding free entry for devotees, further excavation, and the opening of a locked room, asserting the court's order necessitates unrestricted access and removal of 'unauthorised Islamic symbols'.

description: Speculation about Virat Kohli's potential return to Test cricket has resurfaced following comments from his childhood coach, Rajkumar Sharma. Sharma hinted that discussions regarding a comeback are underway, igniting excitement among fans who believe the former captain still has unfinished business in the longest format. Kohli retired from Test cricket in May 2025 after a distinguished 14-year career.

description: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."  This move, following his relocation from Silicon Valley, reflects Brin's broader campaign against wealth redistribution measures, which he links to his personal experience fleeing socialism.

Mark Zuckerberg's email to employees has a 'goodbye note' for those laid off
description: Meta has initiated significant layoffs, sending emails to thousands of employees whose positions are being eliminated.  Company leadership confirmed the decision to reduce headcount for increased efficiency.  Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg also sent a company-wide memo expressing gratitude to departing employees and outlining future company direction.  He assured remaining staff that no further company-wide layoffs are expected this year.

description: During a Tamil Nadu Cabinet expansion, Governor Arlekar cautioned Congress MLA S. Rajesh Kumar to adhere strictly to the written oath after he deviated to praise party leaders. Kumar, along with other new ministers, took their oaths at Lok Bhavan. Subsequently, other TVK legislators also added party-specific slogans to their affirmations.

Unified RERA portal launched: What it means for buyers, project transparency
description: A new unified RERA portal now centralises real estate project information nationwide, offering homebuyers unprecedented transparency and ease of access. Buyers can now verify project registrations, builder compliance, and complaint statuses on a single platform, simplifying the purchasing process and reducing reliance on builder claims. This initiative aims to streamline data and empower consumers.
